notes: Prices in cents per 1,000,000 tokens. See README.md for update process. Anthropic entries now split plain input (input_cents_per_mtok = base 1x) from cache writes (cache_write_cents_per_mtok = 5m cache-write rate); requires app >= cache-write-bucket release. tier_threshold_tokens overrides the default 200k tier boundary; tier_boundary_inclusive=true means >= instead of >. Field names *_above_200k are legacy labels: the real boundary is tier_threshold_tokens when set.

gpt-5.4.notes: Long-context tier verified 2026-07-08 (OpenAI pricing page screenshot): >=272K bills 500/50/2250. Field names *_above_200k are legacy; real boundary = tier_threshold_tokens (272000, inclusive since short context is '<272K').

gpt-5.4-pro.notes: No cached-input pricing offered for pro models (cached set to 0; cached_tokens always 0). Long-context tier verified 2026-07-08: >=272K bills 6000/0/27000. Boundary = 272000, inclusive.

gpt-5.5.notes: Long-context tier verified 2026-07-08: >=272K bills 1000/100/4500. Boundary = tier_threshold_tokens 272000, inclusive.

gpt-5.5-pro.notes: No cached-input pricing offered for pro models (cached set to 0). Long-context tier verified 2026-07-08: >=272K bills 6000/0/27000. Boundary = 272000, inclusive.

claude-haiku-4-5.notes: Routed to Vertex 'global' (CLAUDE_MODEL_LOCATIONS pin). input=base 1x; cache_write=5m cache-write; cached=cache-hit.

claude-sonnet-4-5.notes: Routed to Vertex 'global'. Only 4.x Claude with a long-context tier; Vertex charges premium at >=200K (inclusive), hence tier_boundary_inclusive.

claude-sonnet-4-6.notes: Routed to Vertex 'global'. input=base 1x; cache_write=5m cache-write; cached=cache-hit.

claude-sonnet-5.manual_only_reason: EU-priced entry (routed to 'eu' multi-region default); a scraper reading the global pricing page would wrongly overwrite with global rates.

Flat across context length (no >200K premium). input=base 1x; cache_write=5m cache-write; cached=cache-hit.

mistral-medium-latest.notes: Mistral Medium 3.5. See '-latest' alias warning on mistral-small-latest.

mistral-large-latest.notes: Mistral Large 3 (price DROPPED vs Large 2). See '-latest' alias warning on mistral-small-latest.

mistral-euaiact-finetuned.notes: Contract-priced; verify against the Mistral agreement, not public pages.

gemini-2.5-flash-lite.notes: Served from europe-west4 (VERTEX_GEMINI_LOCATION default); Gemini 2.5 family currently has no regional uplift, so regional = global price. Re-check if Google extends non-global pricing to 2.5.

gemini-2.5-flash-lite-global.manual_only_reason: Vertex AI global-region alias; same price as gemini-2.5-flash-lite; no public pricing page to scrape

gemini-2.5-flash.notes: Served from europe-west4; no regional uplift for the 2.5 family currently. Audio input ($1.00) is NOT representable; only relevant if audio input is ever accepted.

gemini-2.5-flash-global.manual_only_reason: Vertex AI global-region alias; same price as gemini-2.5-flash; no public pricing page to scrape

gemini-2.5-pro.notes: CORRECTED 2026-07-08: previously stored the >200K premium tier as the flat rate, overcharging all <=200K requests ~2x input / 1.5x output. Cached=13 per Vertex page rounding ($0.13). Served from europe-west4; no 2.5-family uplift.

gemini-3-flash-preview.notes: Preview model: no regional uplift shown on Vertex page (uplift applies to GA Gemini 3+ only). Audio input ($1.00) not representable.

gemini-3.1-flash-lite-preview.manual_only_reason: EU-priced entry (explicitly routed to 'eu' multi-region in google.ts); a scraper reading global rates would wrongly overwrite.
gemini-3.1-flash-lite-preview.notes: UPDATED 2026-07-08: non-global uplift (+10%) in effect since 2026-07-01 per Vertex page (Global 25/2.5/150 -> Non-global 27.5/2.75/165). Routing confirmed: EU_MULTIREGION_GEMINI_MODELS.

gemini-3.1-flash-lite-preview-global.manual_only_reason: Vertex AI global-endpoint alias; no public pricing page to scrape

gemini-3.1-pro-preview.notes: UPDATED 2026-07-08: added >200K premium tier (was flat at base, undercharging long-context). Routed forced-global (GLOBAL_ONLY_GEMINI_MODELS), so global rates apply.

gemini-3.5-flash-lite.notes: Added 2026-07-23. Routed forced-global (GLOBAL_ONLY_GEMINI_MODELS in google.ts), so global rates apply — the +10% non-global uplift on GA Gemini 3+ does NOT apply here; do not 'correct' to 33/3.3/275. Flat across context length (no >200K premium).

gemini-3.6-flash.notes: Added 2026-07-23. Routed forced-global (GLOBAL_ONLY_GEMINI_MODELS), so global rates apply. Source pricing table showed no global/non-global split for this model; global rate is correct given forced-global routing. Flat across context length (no >200K premium).

gemini-3-pro-image.manual_only_reason: Google image (Nano Banana Pro); no image-pricing scraper in repo, and this is a per-token price re-expressed as flat per-image — manage manually.
gemini-3-pro-image.notes: Nano Banana Pro. Added 2026-07-23. Flat = 1K/1MP output image cost (1120 tokens = $0.134). Google bills per-token by resolution; app requests default 1K only (no imageSize sent to imageConfig, google.ts) so 1K is correct today. Re-verify if a 2K/4K selector is ever added — 4K output is $0.24 (would under-bill at this flat value). Global-only (client hard-pinned to 'global').

gemini-3.1-flash-image.manual_only_reason: Google image (Nano Banana 2); no image-pricing scraper in repo, per-token price re-expressed as flat per-image — manage manually.
gemini-3.1-flash-image.notes: Nano Banana 2. Added 2026-07-23. Flat = 1K/1MP output image cost (1120 tokens = $0.067). App requests default 1K only. Re-verify if a 2K/4K selector is added — 4K output is $0.15. Global-only (client hard-pinned).

gemini-3.1-flash-lite-image.manual_only_reason: Google image (Nano Banana 2 Lite); no image-pricing scraper in repo, per-token price re-expressed as flat per-image — manage manually.
